question: Show 10 rows from public.player.
sql: SELECT * FROM "public"."player" LIMIT 10;

question: How many players are in public.player?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS player_count FROM "public"."player";

question: How many players registered in the last 30 days?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS player_count FROM "public"."player" WHERE "created_at" >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days';

question: Show daily player registrations for the last 30 days.
sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', "created_at") AS registration_day, COUNT(*) AS player_count FROM "public"."player" WHERE "created_at" >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

question: How many players signed up with each login provider?
sql: SELECT lp."name" AS provider, COUNT(*) AS player_count FROM "public"."player" p LEFT JOIN "public"."login_provider" lp ON p."provider_id" = lp."id" GROUP BY lp."name" ORDER BY player_count DESC;

question: How many players are in each availability status?
sql: SELECT a."name" AS availability_status, COUNT(*) AS player_count FROM "public"."player" p LEFT JOIN "public"."availability" a ON p."availability_id" = a."id" GROUP BY a."name" ORDER BY player_count DESC;

question: How many players are in each gameplay status?
sql: SELECT gs."name" AS gameplay_status, COUNT(*) AS player_count FROM "public"."player" p LEFT JOIN "public"."gameplay_status" gs ON p."gameplay_status_id" = gs."id" GROUP BY gs."name" ORDER BY player_count DESC;

question: What are the top 20 countries by player count?
sql: SELECT c."name" AS country, COUNT(*) AS player_count FROM "public"."player" p LEFT JOIN "public"."country" c ON p."country_id" = c."id" GROUP BY c."name" ORDER BY player_count DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20;

question: How many players are in each continent?
sql: SELECT c."name" AS continent, COUNT(*) AS player_count FROM "public"."player" p LEFT JOIN "public"."continent" c ON p."continent_id" = c."id" GROUP BY c."name" ORDER BY player_count DESC NULLS LAST;

question: How many players are on each OS and version code?
sql: SELECT "os", "version_code", COUNT(*) AS player_count FROM "public"."player" GROUP BY "os", "version_code" ORDER BY player_count DESC;

question: How many players updated their username at least once?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS players_with_username_updates FROM "public"."player" WHERE COALESCE("username_update_count", 0) > 0;

question: How many players created in the last 30 days never logged in?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS never_logged_in_players FROM "public"."player" p WHERE p."created_at" >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."player_login" pl WHERE pl."player_id" = p."id");

question: Show daily login events for the last 30 days.
sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', "logged_in_at") AS login_day, COUNT(*) AS login_events FROM "public"."player_login" WHERE "logged_in_at" >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

question: Who are the top 20 players by login events in the last 30 days?
sql: SELECT p."id" AS player_id, p."username", COUNT(*) AS login_events FROM "public"."player_login" pl JOIN "public"."player" p ON pl."player_id" = p."id" WHERE pl."logged_in_at" >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY p."id", p."username" ORDER BY login_events DESC LIMIT 20;

question: How many linked accounts exist for each provider?
sql: SELECT lp."name" AS provider, COUNT(*) AS linked_account_count FROM "public"."linked_account" la LEFT JOIN "public"."login_provider" lp ON la."provider_id" = lp."id" GROUP BY lp."name" ORDER BY linked_account_count DESC;

question: How many players use each background and card theme combination?
sql: SELECT COALESCE("background_theme", 'UNKNOWN') AS background_theme, COALESCE("card_theme", 'UNKNOWN') AS card_theme, COUNT(*) AS player_count FROM "public"."view_user_pref" GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY player_count DESC;

question: How many user preference rows are in each game speed?
sql: SELECT "game_speed", COUNT(*) AS preference_count FROM "public"."user_preference" GROUP BY "game_speed" ORDER BY preference_count DESC;

question: How many friend requests are in each status?
sql: SELECT frs."name" AS request_status, COUNT(*) AS request_count FROM "public"."friend_requests" fr LEFT JOIN "public"."friend_request_status" frs ON fr."status_id" = frs."id" GROUP BY frs."name" ORDER BY request_count DESC;

question: Which 20 players sent the most friend requests?
sql: SELECT p."id" AS player_id, p."username", COUNT(*) AS sent_request_count FROM "public"."friend_requests" fr JOIN "public"."player" p ON fr."sender_id" = p."id" GROUP BY p."id", p."username" ORDER BY sent_request_count DESC LIMIT 20;

question: Show friendships created by month.
sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "connected_date") AS connected_month, COUNT(*) AS friendship_count FROM "public"."friend" GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

question: How many referrals are in each status?
sql: SELECT COALESCE("status", 'UNKNOWN') AS referral_status, COUNT(*) AS referral_count FROM "public"."referral" GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY referral_count DESC;

question: Which 20 players referred the most other players?
sql: SELECT p."id" AS player_id, p."username", COUNT(*) AS referral_count FROM "public"."referral" r JOIN "public"."player" p ON r."referred_by" = p."id" GROUP BY p."id", p."username" ORDER BY referral_count DESC LIMIT 20;

question: Show referral claims by day for the last 30 days.
sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', "claimed_at") AS claim_day, COUNT(*) AS claimed_referrals FROM "public"."referral" WHERE "claimed_at" >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

question: How many pending referrals are older than 30 days?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS stale_pending_referrals FROM "public"."referral" WHERE "status" = 'PENDING' AND "created_at" < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days';

question: Show games started by day for the last 30 days.
sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', "started_at") AS game_day, COUNT(*) AS games_started FROM "public"."game" WHERE "started_at" >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

question: How many games are in each game mode?
sql: SELECT gm."name" AS game_mode, COUNT(*) AS game_count FROM "public"."game" g LEFT JOIN "public"."game_mode" gm ON g."game_mode_id" = gm."id" GROUP BY gm."name" ORDER BY game_count DESC;

question: How many games are in each game scope?
sql: SELECT gs."name" AS game_scope, COUNT(*) AS game_count FROM "public"."game" g LEFT JOIN "public"."game_scope" gs ON g."game_scope_id" = gs."id" GROUP BY gs."name" ORDER BY game_count DESC;

question: Show completed versus canceled games by game scope.
sql: SELECT gs."name" AS game_scope, SUM(CASE WHEN g."completed" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed_games, SUM(CASE WHEN g."canceled" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS canceled_games FROM "public"."game" g LEFT JOIN "public"."game_scope" gs ON g."game_scope_id" = gs."id" GROUP BY gs."name" ORDER BY completed_games DESC;

question: What is the average game duration by game mode?
sql: SELECT gm."name" AS game_mode, AVG(g."duration") AS avg_duration FROM "public"."game" g LEFT JOIN "public"."game_mode" gm ON g."game_mode_id" = gm."id" WHERE g."duration" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY gm."name" ORDER BY avg_duration DESC NULLS LAST;

question: What is the average score by game mode?
sql: SELECT gm."name" AS game_mode, AVG(g."score") AS avg_score FROM "public"."game" g LEFT JOIN "public"."game_mode" gm ON g."game_mode_id" = gm."id" WHERE g."score" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY gm."name" ORDER BY avg_score DESC NULLS LAST;

question: Who are the top 20 players by completed games?
sql: SELECT p."id" AS player_id, p."username", COUNT(*) AS completed_games FROM "public"."game" g JOIN "public"."player" p ON g."player_id" = p."id" WHERE g."completed" = TRUE GROUP BY p."id", p."username" ORDER BY completed_games DESC LIMIT 20;

question: Show the rank distribution for completed games.
sql: SELECT "rank", COUNT(*) AS game_count FROM "public"."game" WHERE "completed" = TRUE AND "rank" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY "rank" ORDER BY "rank";

question: How many games were favorited by users versus the system?
sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN "is_favorite_by_user" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS user_favorites, SUM(CASE WHEN "is_favorite_by_system" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS system_favorites FROM "public"."game";

question: Show the top 20 players by number of games played in their first 7 days.
sql: SELECT "Player ID", "Username", "Registration Date", "Number of Games in First 7 Days" FROM "public"."view_day7_games_played" LIMIT 20;

question: Show the top 20 players by number of games played in their first 3 days.
sql: SELECT "Player ID", "Username", "Registration Date", "Number of Games in First 3 Days" FROM "public"."view_day3_games_played" LIMIT 20;

question: Who are the top 50 players by current skill in the player_skills view?
sql: SELECT ps."player_id", p."username", ps."mu" AS skill_mu, ps."sigma" AS skill_sigma, ps."total_games", ps."total_completed" FROM "public"."player_skills" ps LEFT JOIN "public"."player" p ON ps."player_id" = p."id" ORDER BY ps."mu" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50;

question: What are the average skill and total games by login provider?
sql: SELECT lp."name" AS provider, AVG(ps."mu") AS avg_skill_mu, AVG(ps."total_games") AS avg_total_games FROM "public"."player_skills" ps JOIN "public"."player" p ON ps."player_id" = p."id" LEFT JOIN "public"."login_provider" lp ON p."provider_id" = lp."id" GROUP BY lp."name" ORDER BY avg_skill_mu DESC NULLS LAST;

question: Which 20 players have the highest 99th percentile matchmaking wait time?
sql: SELECT ps."player_id", p."username", ps."wait_time_p99", ps."max_wait_time" FROM "public"."player_skills" ps LEFT JOIN "public"."player" p ON ps."player_id" = p."id" ORDER BY ps."wait_time_p99" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20;

question: Show aggregated statistics by game mode and game scope for time_range_id 0.
sql: SELECT gm."name" AS game_mode, gs."name" AS game_scope, COUNT(*) AS stat_rows, AVG(s."total_games") AS avg_total_games, AVG(s."win_ratio") AS avg_win_ratio, AVG(s."skill") AS avg_skill FROM "public"."statistics" s LEFT JOIN "public"."game_mode" gm ON s."game_mode_id" = gm."id" LEFT JOIN "public"."game_scope" gs ON s."game_scope_id" = gs."id" WHERE s."time_range_id" = 0 GROUP BY gm."name", gs."name" ORDER BY stat_rows DESC;

question: How many achievement records exist for each metric?
sql: SELECT m."name" AS metric_name, COUNT(*) AS achievement_rows FROM "public"."achievements" a JOIN "public"."metrics" m ON a."metric_id" = m."id" GROUP BY m."name" ORDER BY achievement_rows DESC;

question: Show the top 20 world-ranked players for the SKILL metric.
sql: SELECT a."world_rank", p."id" AS player_id, p."username", gm."name" AS game_mode, gs."name" AS game_scope, a."skill", a."world_percentile" FROM "public"."achievements" a JOIN "public"."metrics" m ON a."metric_id" = m."id" JOIN "public"."player" p ON a."player_id" = p."id" LEFT JOIN "public"."game_mode" gm ON a."game_mode_id" = gm."id" LEFT JOIN "public"."game_scope" gs ON a."game_scope_id" = gs."id" WHERE m."name" = 'SKILL' AND a."world_rank" IS NOT NULL ORDER BY a."world_rank" ASC LIMIT 20;

question: Show the top 20 world-ranked players for the WIN_RATIO metric.
sql: SELECT a."world_rank", p."id" AS player_id, p."username", gm."name" AS game_mode, gs."name" AS game_scope, a."win_ratio", a."world_percentile" FROM "public"."achievements" a JOIN "public"."metrics" m ON a."metric_id" = m."id" JOIN "public"."player" p ON a."player_id" = p."id" LEFT JOIN "public"."game_mode" gm ON a."game_mode_id" = gm."id" LEFT JOIN "public"."game_scope" gs ON a."game_scope_id" = gs."id" WHERE m."name" = 'WIN_RATIO' AND a."world_rank" IS NOT NULL ORDER BY a."world_rank" ASC LIMIT 20;

question: What is the average world percentile by metric?
sql: SELECT m."name" AS metric_name, AVG(a."world_percentile") AS avg_world_percentile FROM "public"."achievements" a JOIN "public"."metrics" m ON a."metric_id" = m."id" WHERE a."world_percentile" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY m."name" ORDER BY avg_world_percentile DESC NULLS LAST;

question: Show the current leaderboard metadata.
sql: SELECT * FROM "public"."leaderboard_metadata";

question: How many ticket_activity rows are in each status during the last 30 days?
sql: SELECT "status", COUNT(*) AS activity_count FROM "public"."ticket_activity" WHERE "created_at" >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY "status" ORDER BY activity_count DESC;

question: What is the median total wait time by ticket status in the last 30 days?
sql: SELECT "status", PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "total_wait_time") AS median_total_wait_time FROM "public"."ticket_activity" WHERE "created_at" >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY "status" ORDER BY median_total_wait_time DESC NULLS LAST;

question: What are the average disconnection and reconnection counts by ticket status?
sql: SELECT "status", AVG("disconnection_count") AS avg_disconnections, AVG("reconnection_count") AS avg_reconnections FROM "public"."ticket_activity" GROUP BY "status" ORDER BY avg_disconnections DESC NULLS LAST;

question: Which 20 players have the most NOTFOUND matchmaking results?
sql: SELECT p."id" AS player_id, p."username", COUNT(*) AS notfound_count FROM "public"."ticket_activity" ta LEFT JOIN "public"."player" p ON ta."uid" = p."id"::text WHERE ta."status" = 'NOTFOUND' GROUP BY p."id", p."username" ORDER BY notfound_count DESC LIMIT 20;

question: Which 20 players have the most matchmaking issues in view_each_players_issue_count?
sql: SELECT p."id" AS player_id, p."username", v."issue_count" FROM "public"."view_each_players_issue_count" v LEFT JOIN "public"."player" p ON v."uid" = p."id"::text ORDER BY v."issue_count" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20;

question: How many current matchmaking tickets exist by game mode?
sql: SELECT gm."name" AS game_mode, COUNT(*) AS open_ticket_count FROM "public"."tickets" t LEFT JOIN "public"."game_mode" gm ON t."game_mode_id" = gm."id" WHERE COALESCE(t."is_game_completed", FALSE) = FALSE GROUP BY gm."name" ORDER BY open_ticket_count DESC;

question: How many current guest matchmaking tickets exist by game mode?
sql: SELECT gm."name" AS game_mode, COUNT(*) AS open_guest_ticket_count FROM "public"."ticket_guest" tg LEFT JOIN "public"."game_mode" gm ON tg."game_mode_id" = gm."id" WHERE COALESCE(tg."is_game_completed", FALSE) = FALSE GROUP BY gm."name" ORDER BY open_guest_ticket_count DESC;

question: Who are the top 20 players by current gems in player_vault?
sql: SELECT pv."player_id", p."username", pv."gems", pv."unclaimed_gems", pv."unprocessed_playsuper_gems" FROM "public"."player_vault" pv LEFT JOIN "public"."player" p ON pv."player_id" = p."id" ORDER BY pv."gems" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20;

question: Who are the top 20 players by coin balance in wallet?
sql: SELECT w."player_id", p."username", w."coin", w."gem" FROM "public"."wallet" w LEFT JOIN "public"."player" p ON w."player_id" = p."id" ORDER BY w."coin" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20;

question: Show gem transaction totals by source.
sql: SELECT COALESCE("source", 'UNKNOWN') AS transaction_source, COUNT(*) AS transaction_count, SUM("amount") AS total_amount, AVG("amount") AS avg_amount FROM "public"."gem_transaction" GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY total_amount DESC NULLS LAST;

question: Show daily reward claims by day for the last 30 days.
sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', "claimed_at") AS claim_day, COUNT(*) AS reward_claims FROM "public"."daily_rewards_transaction" WHERE "claimed_at" >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

question: Show reward claims by reward type and reward version.
sql: SELECT r."reward_type", r."reward_version", COUNT(*) AS claim_count, SUM(COALESCE(r."coin_value", 0)) AS total_coin_value, SUM(COALESCE(r."gem_value", 0)) AS total_gem_value FROM "public"."daily_rewards_transaction" drt JOIN "public"."rewards" r ON drt."reward_id" = r."id" GROUP BY r."reward_type", r."reward_version" ORDER BY claim_count DESC;

question: Which offers are active right now?
sql: SELECT "id", "offer_type", "claim_method_id", "featured", "starts_at", "ends_at" FROM "public"."offer" WHERE "starts_at" <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND ("ends_at" IS NULL OR "ends_at" >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ORDER BY "starts_at" DESC;

question: Show listed store items with their asset names and offer ids.
sql: SELECT si."id" AS store_item_id, a."name" AS asset_name, a."product_id", si."offer_id", si."shown_from", si."shown_to" FROM "public"."store_item" si LEFT JOIN "public"."asset" a ON si."asset_id" = a."id" WHERE si."listed" = TRUE ORDER BY si."shown_from" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50;

question: Show active gem packs.
sql: SELECT "product_id", "base_gems", "bonus_percentage", "default_price_sgd", "tag_id", "offer_id" FROM "public"."gem_packs" WHERE "is_active" = TRUE ORDER BY "default_price_sgd" ASC NULLS LAST;

question: How many active IAP products exist for each platform?
sql: SELECT up."platform", COUNT(*) AS active_product_count FROM "public"."iap_products" ip CROSS JOIN LATERAL unnest(ip."platform") AS up("platform") WHERE ip."is_active" = TRUE GROUP BY up."platform" ORDER BY active_product_count DESC;

question: Which campaigns are live today, grouped by target audience?
sql: SELECT "target_audience", COUNT(*) AS live_campaign_count FROM "public"."campaigns" WHERE "start_date" <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND ("end_date" IS NULL OR "end_date" >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) GROUP BY "target_audience" ORDER BY live_campaign_count DESC;

question: How many assets are attached to each campaign?
sql: SELECT c."id" AS campaign_id, c."campaign_id" AS external_campaign_id, c."name", COUNT(ca."product_id") AS asset_count FROM "public"."campaigns" c LEFT JOIN "public"."campaign_assets" ca ON c."id" = ca."campaign_id" GROUP BY c."id", c."campaign_id", c."name" ORDER BY asset_count DESC, c."id";

question: How many App Store purchases are in each status?
sql: SELECT "status", COUNT(*) AS purchase_count FROM "public"."app_store_purchases" GROUP BY "status" ORDER BY purchase_count DESC;

question: How many App Store purchases came from each purchase source?
sql: SELECT "purchase_source", COUNT(*) AS purchase_count FROM "public"."app_store_purchases" GROUP BY "purchase_source" ORDER BY purchase_count DESC;

question: What are the top 20 product ids in app_store_purchases?
sql: SELECT "product_id", COUNT(*) AS purchase_count FROM "public"."app_store_purchases" GROUP BY "product_id" ORDER BY purchase_count DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20;

question: How many parsed product purchases are in each region code?
sql: SELECT COALESCE("region_code", 'UNKNOWN') AS region_code, COUNT(*) AS purchase_count FROM "public"."product_purchases" GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY purchase_count DESC;

question: How many parsed product purchases are in each purchase state?
sql: SELECT COALESCE("purchase_state", 'UNKNOWN') AS purchase_state, COUNT(*) AS purchase_count FROM "public"."product_purchases" GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY purchase_count DESC;

question: How many yesterday IAP rows are in each provider?
sql: SELECT COALESCE("provider", 'UNKNOWN') AS provider, COUNT(*) AS purchase_count FROM "public"."view_yesterday_iap" GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY purchase_count DESC;

question: How many purchase transfers happened for each product id?
sql: SELECT "product_id", COUNT(*) AS transfer_count FROM "public"."purchase_transfer" GROUP BY "product_id" ORDER BY transfer_count DESC NULLS LAST;

question: Show PlaySuper transaction counts and net delta by event type.
sql: SELECT COALESCE("event_type", 'UNKNOWN') AS event_type, COUNT(*) AS transaction_count, SUM("delta") AS net_delta FROM "public"."playsuper_transaction" GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY transaction_count DESC;

question: Show net PlaySuper delta by coin id.
sql: SELECT COALESCE("coin_id", 'UNKNOWN') AS coin_id, COUNT(*) AS transaction_count, SUM("delta") AS net_delta FROM "public"."playsuper_all_transaction" GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY net_delta DESC NULLS LAST;

question: Which PlaySuper brands are listed by category and priority?
sql: SELECT "category", "name", "priority" FROM "public"."playsuper_brands" WHERE "listed" = TRUE ORDER BY "category", "priority" ASC NULLS LAST, "name";

question: Show the app rating distribution.
sql: SELECT "star_count", COUNT(*) AS rating_count FROM "public"."app_rating" GROUP BY "star_count" ORDER BY "star_count";

question: What is the average app rating by login provider?
sql: SELECT lp."name" AS provider, AVG(ar."star_count") AS avg_star_rating, COUNT(*) AS rating_count FROM "public"."app_rating" ar LEFT JOIN "public"."login_provider" lp ON ar."provider_id" = lp."id" GROUP BY lp."name" ORDER BY avg_star_rating DESC NULLS LAST;

question: How many bug reports came from each OS in the last 90 days?
sql: SELECT "os", COUNT(*) AS bug_report_count FROM "public"."bug_report" WHERE "created_at" >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days' GROUP BY "os" ORDER BY bug_report_count DESC;

question: Show monthly ad-related bug reports using view_ads.
sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "created_at") AS report_month, COUNT(*) AS ad_bug_report_count FROM "public"."view_ads" GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

question: How many support messages are in each issue type and purchase status?
sql: SELECT COALESCE("issue_type", 'UNKNOWN') AS issue_type, COALESCE("purchase_status", 'UNKNOWN') AS purchase_status, COUNT(*) AS message_count FROM "public"."support_message" GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY message_count DESC;

question: Which API endpoints are slowest by average response_time?
sql: SELECT "api_name", AVG("response_time") AS avg_response_time, AVG("total_time") AS avg_total_time, COUNT(*) AS sample_count FROM "public"."api_profile" GROUP BY "api_name" ORDER BY avg_response_time DESC NULLS LAST;

question: Show API profile rows by api_name and api_status.
sql: SELECT "api_name", "api_status", COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM "public"."api_profile" GROUP BY "api_name", "api_status" ORDER BY row_count DESC;

question: Which surveys are active today?
sql: SELECT "survey_uid", "survey_name", "start_date", "end_date" FROM "public"."surveys" WHERE "start_date" <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND ("end_date" IS NULL OR "end_date" >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ORDER BY "start_date";

question: How many survey responses came from each survey?
sql: SELECT s."survey_name", COUNT(*) AS response_count FROM "public"."survey_responses" sr LEFT JOIN "public"."surveys" s ON sr."survey_uid" = s."survey_uid" GROUP BY s."survey_name" ORDER BY response_count DESC;

question: How many survey responses came from each entry point?
sql: SELECT COALESCE("entry_point", 'UNKNOWN') AS entry_point, COUNT(*) AS response_count FROM "public"."survey_responses" GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY response_count DESC;

question: Which events are active today?
sql: SELECT "name", "start_date", "end_date" FROM "public"."events" WHERE "start_date" <= CURRENT_DATE AND ("end_date" IS NULL OR "end_date" >= CURRENT_DATE) ORDER BY "start_date";

question: Show event login claims by event name and day.
sql: SELECT "event_name", "day", COUNT(*) AS claim_count FROM "public"."events_login" WHERE "claimed_at" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY "event_name", "day" ORDER BY "event_name", "day";

question: Show user event claim summary by event_name.
sql: SELECT "event_name", COUNT(*) AS user_event_rows, SUM(CASE WHEN "wallpaper_claimed_at" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS wallpaper_claims, SUM(CASE WHEN "card_claimed_at" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS card_claims FROM "public"."user_events" GROUP BY "event_name" ORDER BY user_event_rows DESC;

question: Which themes are active today?
sql: SELECT "theme_identifier", "start_date", "end_date" FROM "public"."themes" WHERE "start_date" <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND ("end_date" IS NULL OR "end_date" >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ORDER BY "start_date";

question: Which holidays are coming up in the next 30 days by country?
sql: SELECT h."date", c."name" AS country, h."name", h."title" FROM "public"."holiday" h LEFT JOIN "public"."country" c ON h."country_id" = c."id" WHERE h."date" >= CURRENT_DATE AND h."date" < CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY h."date", c."name";

question: Show notifications by notification_type and app version.
sql: SELECT n."notification_type", v."os", v."version", COUNT(*) AS notification_count FROM "public"."notification" n LEFT JOIN "public"."version" v ON n."version_id" = v."id" GROUP BY n."notification_type", v."os", v."version" ORDER BY notification_count DESC;

question: Show app installs by platform and version code.
sql: SELECT "platform", "version_code", COUNT(*) AS install_count FROM "public"."app_install" GROUP BY "platform", "version_code" ORDER BY install_count DESC;

question: Show anniversary login claims by day.
sql: SELECT "day", COUNT(*) AS claim_count FROM "public"."aniversary_login" WHERE "claimed_at" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY "day" ORDER BY "day";

question: How many voided purchases exist?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS voided_purchase_count FROM "public"."voided_purchases";
